🇭🇷 That’s our Livaković. A nation of ~3.8 million, and they still put a keeper on the field who saved Kane’s penalty and made six saves in five minutes. Same guy who ended Brazil in 2022. Croatia doesn’t have the population, we just always show up on the world stage. Win or lose, we coming for action. 🫡🇭🇷🚀

The re-taking of the penalty in these cases needs to be scratched from the rules.
If the penalty-taker is allowed to stop their run-up, then the goalie should be allowed to do that. ESPECIALLY if it did not have to be re-taken if it was a goal. Basically, it is the "infinite penalty glitch".

I propose a rule change: that both the goalie and the kicker are allowed to move once the ref gives the signal.

England played better, deserved win BUT the 11 meter penalty is a JOKE. - the english player jumps from behind like a kangaroo when Luka Modric was trying to hit the ball. there was NO intention to foul (rules require intention) and also it was only a soft contact (rules require hard contact). 0:10 At 1st it looks like he hit him in the groin but he only touched his right leg softly.
